items.name: Scope prepare workflow
items.default_use: Use when target and scope need validation without network activity.
items.ai_gate: AI reviews authorization status before any active collection.
items.notes: Contains scope validation, target normalization, empty attack-surface shell, next-step options, and report draft.

items.name: Basic collection workflow
items.default_use: Use after explicit authorization when DNS, HTTP liveness, and low-rate port scanning should run automatically.
items.ai_gate: AI reviews returned ai_output before service identification, web discovery, or nuclei.
items.notes: Active steps are blocked unless confirm_authorized is supplied through params or recon_scan.confirm_authorized config.

items.name: Service identify
items.default_use: Run after AI reviews open ports and chooses host/port scope.

items.name: Web light discovery
items.default_use: Run after AI reviews live HTTP endpoints.
items.notes: Uses or ingests tlsx, katana, and optional ffuf output.

items.name: Vulnerability candidate scan
items.default_use: Run only after AI selects target URLs and severity scope.
items.notes: Uses or ingests nuclei output; all findings stay candidate-only.

items.name: Report generate
items.default_use: Run after each stage and at final completion.
items.ai_gate: AI saves final_result with save_session_result when complete.
items.notes: Produces structured final_result and markdown draft for frontend result mapping.
